task: Find the address and phone of the Office of the Inspector General (OIG).
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from justice.gov to the DOJ Office of the Inspector General site and verified the contact details on the OIG Office Directory page. The expanded Headquarters section explicitly showed: 'U.S. Department of Justice Office of the Inspector General 950 Pennsylvania Avenue NW Washington, D.C. 20530' and 'Phone: (202) 514-3435'. The final answer matches the website evidence.
final_result_response:
Office of the Inspector General (OIG)  
U.S. Department of Justice  
950 Pennsylvania Avenue NW  
Washington, D.C. 20530  

Phone: (202) 514-3435
action_history: Opening Justice Department website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.justice.gov/');
Opening OIG page from DOJ footer: await page.locator('e75').click();
Checking OIG contact page: await page.locator('e86').click();
Expanding OIG headquarters directory: await page.locator('e23').click();

screenshots.title: Opening OIG page from DOJ footer
